sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72726" key="oi)wnokto/nos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οἰωνο-κτόνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72726.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">killing birds,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χειμών</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0085.tlg005.perseus-grc1:563" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">563</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
